title: MaskingRecipe
description:
Apply the first band of `imageMask` as a per-pixel mask to `imageToMask` — zero/masked pixels in the mask become masked in output; non-zero pass through unchanged.

Uses: mask non-forest from a continuous index, mask out water bodies, exclude cloud-contaminated pixels with an external cloud mask.

Pipeline: `imageToMask.updateMask(imageMask.select(0))`. Output bands inherited from `imageToMask`.

**Only the first band of `imageMask` is used.** The legacy `maskOptions.band/values/negate` field is not read by EE and has been removed. To mask by a specific band/values, build a single-band binary mask upstream (Band Math).

AOI implicit (geometry of `imageToMask`). LLM must populate both `imageToMask` and `imageMask`; no defaults.

inputImage.title: MaskingInputImage
inputImage.description: SEPAL recipe ref or EE asset.

type.description: `RECIPE_REF` = SEPAL recipe id; `ASSET` = EE Image/ImageCollection asset id.

id.description: Recipe id or EE asset id (per `type`).

bands.description: All bands the source exposes. Use `image_bands({type, id})` to look up; copy verbatim. Backend only reads `imageMask`'s first band; output inherits all bands of `imageToMask`.

visualizations.description: Optional. Source's preset visualizations; GUI refetches on form open if absent. Use `image_visualizations({type, id})` (no `band` filter) to populate.
